purpose: Track council agenda and minute items across historical records to detect items that appear, disappear, defer, reappear, rename, or remain unresolved without clear closure evidence.
publicUseWarning: This register is a disappearance-detection tool. It does not prove concealment, misconduct, intent, legal breach, or factual correctness without source-record preservation and manual verification.
trackingRules: Every identified agenda item must be matched against the next available minutes.
Every resolution in minutes must be checked against later action registers or subsequent reports.
If an item appears in an agenda but no matching resolution, deferral, withdrawal or closure is found in minutes, flag missing-next-cycle.
If an item disappears for two or more meeting cycles without closure evidence, flag missing-multiple-cycles.
If wording changes but subject, location, actors or source path remain similar, flag rename-candidate rather than treating as resolved.
No item may be marked closed unless closure evidence is recorded.

items.notes: Seed item only. Requires historical agenda/minutes scrape and manual extraction before making any disappearance finding.
